I build what I
wish existed.

I'm Divjot, a developer, builder, speaker, and community leader turning ambitious ideas into useful technology and helping others do the same.

About me

Curiosity, converted into momentum.

I care less about perfect plans and more about real things that help real people. Products, communities, and ideas all get better when they leave the notebook.

From SaaS experiments to grassroots technology literacy, I build across code, community, and communication.

As Growth Lead at GDG Ludhiana, I help scale developer communities and make the first step into technology feel possible. Through SOS TECH, I'm working to make technology more practical and accessible for learners.

Build early. Learn fast. Help others do the same.
CommunityScale people,
not just products.
CraftIdeas become credible when they ship.
IDEA
Operating systemThink boldly → make simply → learn publicly.

Selected work

Ideas with a job to do.

A portfolio of products and initiatives designed around usefulness, access, wellbeing, and belonging.

01

Social impact platform

Literating India

Bridging the digital divide by bringing practical technology literacy to grassroots communities across India.
Non-profitDigital IndiaEducation
02

Mental wellness product

CalmNest

A calm-technology concept designed to reduce digital noise, create clarity, and make online experiences feel more intentional.
ProductReactMental wellness
03

Community infrastructure

Community Hub

A platform concept enabling student-led technology communities to organize, thrive, and scale their collective impact.
CommunityPlatformFirebase

Experience & leadership

A journey measured in action.

Each chapter added a new way to build: with code, on stage, inside communities, and alongside ambitious young people.

Now

Building useful systems

Developing SaaS products, AI workflows, community platforms, and practical learning experiences in public.

01
2026

National stages & recognition

TEDx speaker and one of the youngest national finalists at the Viksit Bharat Young Leaders Dialogue.

02
2023—Present

Growth Lead, GDG Ludhiana

Leading growth and community initiatives that have reached 1,000+ developers and helped students begin in technology.

03
2023

Josh Talks speaker

Shared a message about starting early, learning through execution, and building before feeling fully ready.

04
Earlier

Author & self-starting builder

Authored coding books and began turning curiosity into practical tools, products, and opportunities for others.

05

Speaking & media

Make the room believe it can begin.

Across stages and developer communities, the message stays practical: start before certainty arrives, and let the work teach you.

A message of early execution shared with thousands.

Growing every chapter

Skills ecosystem

Full-stack thinking, human outcomes.

Technology is the medium. The real skill is connecting product, systems, storytelling, and community into one clear experience.

Proof, not posturing

The work speaks in outcomes.

The current story is told through stages earned, communities grown, learners helped, and products shipped — without borrowing somebody else's words.

“
The future belongs to those who build it. Don't wait for permission. Start now.

Divjot Singh Arora · Personal credo shared through speaking & community work

TEDx and Josh Talks speaker
Growth Lead at GDG Ludhiana
National VBYLD finalist
Builder of learning and social-impact platforms

Personal philosophy

Don't wait for permission.
Build before you're ready.

Readiness is often just experience viewed backwards. The faster route is to begin, pay attention, and become capable in motion.

Build something meaningful

Open to ambitious conversations

Have an idea with
some gravity?

Tell me about it
